chronology.interpretation: The unauthorized execution preceded the written audit rejection. It was discovered only during the later worktree provenance audit.

recovered_bytecode.claim_limit: Forensic recovery only. Bytecode is not scientific source, does not recover the deleted preregistration, and cannot validate the source/preregistration SHA-256 strings recorded elsewhere.

recovered_execution_semantics.tape_generation: make_tape(seed0 + i) for i=0..399 with NumPy SeedSequence([seed, 2729])

hard_coded_field.scientific_effect: Retracted as evidence. The value cannot support reproduction of the paper's dominant strategy.

independent_recovery_check.result: An in-memory CPython 3.11.15 / NumPy 2.4.6 replay of the recovered bytecode reproduced every raw JSON key exactly.
independent_recovery_check.claim_limit: This establishes the immediate generator of the quarantined JSON, not the validity of its physics, policy, comparators, resources, metrics or custody.

seed_custody.unbounded_remainder: 9600401+ withdrawn and not reusable under the rejected declaration
seed_custody.uncertainty: No stdout/stderr, command manifest or invocation log proves that the deleted runner was not executed additional times. Any future valid protocol must use a wholly disjoint block.
